name: bmad-personal-workflow
description: Codex-first BMAD workflow plugin for solo software development.

interface.shortDescription: A lightweight BMAD workflow for solo builders in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Guides a solo developer through clarify, plan, build, and review using a small set of distinct BMAD roles and compact structured outputs.
defaultPrompt: Use BMAD quick-dev for this feature idea.
Plan this change with the BMAD solo workflow.
